category_sources: source_facts.description identifies emmylua_ls as a Lua language server.
display_name_sources: source_facts.description expands the project as Lua Language Server; source_facts.repo identifies the official EmmyLuaLs analyzer project.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub repository; its README is the best official documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description states Lua Language Server; source_facts.executables include emmylua_ls and analysis/documentation tools.
